summary: The most operationally significant development is the targeted killing of two IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) members in western Iran under mysterious circumstances, with Tehran pointing fingers at the Israeli Mossad. Meanwhile, an IDF (Israel Defense Forces) military cellphone belonging to a soldier was dropped in southern Syria near Tal al-Maghar hill and the border village of Abidin, bearing stickers identifying it as Israeli army property. Tensions escalated domestically as Israeli protestors in Bnei Brak launched harsh rhetoric against the Chief of Staff, drawing condemnation from both Prime Minister Netanyahu and opposition leader Benny Gantz.
key_points: Two IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) members were killed under mysterious circumstances in western Iran overnight, with Tehran accusing the Israeli Mossad. (Source: @pkpoi/143042)

An IDF (Israel Defense Forces) Samsung XCover Pro 6 military cellphone was dropped near Tal al-Maghar hill and the border village of Abidin in southern Syria, bearing Israeli army stickers and a serial number. (Source: @manniefabian/58712)

Protestors at a Shas demonstration in Bnei Brak directed harsh rhetoric against the IDF Chief of Staff, prompting condemnation from both Prime Minister Netanyahu and Blue and White chairman Benny Gantz. (Source: @N12chat/215267)
The IDF (Israel Defense Forces) and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, the military security chief of Hamas's Rafah Brigade, in an airstrike last week. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

A massive Hamas tunnel system in the southern Gaza Strip, over 16 kilometers long and extending 25 meters deep with approximately 80 rooms, was sealed using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)
Clashes erupted in Yaroumaja village in Kirkuk Governorate, northern Iraq, between an armed group and the Iraqi army. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80354)

Kurdish media reported the unification of Peshmerga forces in northern Iraq, with the former '70th and 80th Forces' now designated as Region Command One and Region Command Two. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80363)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian stated Iran enters negotiations from a position of strength, citing popular resistance, armed forces capability, and preserved internal cohesion. (Source: @SharghDaily/168885)

sections.executive_summary: The most operationally significant development is the targeted killing of two IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) members in western Iran under mysterious circumstances, with Tehran pointing fingers at the Israeli Mossad. An IDF (Israel Defense Forces) military cellphone belonging to a soldier was dropped in southern Syria near Tal al-Maghar hill and the border village of Abidin, bearing stickers identifying it as Israeli army property. Domestic tensions in Israel escalated as protestors in Bnei Brak directed harsh rhetoric against the Chief of Staff, drawing condemnation from both Prime Minister Netanyahu and opposition leader Benny Gantz.

points: Two IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) members were killed under mysterious circumstances in western Iran overnight, with Tehran pointing an accusing finger at the Israeli Mossad, though no official confirmation of the claim exists at this stage. (Source: @pkpoi/143042)
Several IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) checkpoints and patrols were spotted near Mehrabad Airport, west of Tehran, Tehran Province. (Source: @shin_persian/7294)

The Deputy of the Velayat-e Faqih (Supreme Leader) Representative Office in the IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) Navy died in a road accident after his vehicle overturned on a road in Kerman Province. (Source: @shin_persian/7300)

Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi stated that Iran and Oman reached a common understanding on the administration of the Strait of Hormuz, with Oman's Foreign Minister expressing support for Iran's plan to impose maritime service fees on vessels crossing the strait. (Source: @presstv/196196)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian stated that Iran enters dialogue from a position of strength, which he attributed to popular resistance, the capability of the armed forces, and the preservation of internal cohesion. (Source: @SharghDaily/168885)

An Iranian newspaper published that revenge is inevitable and that holding war criminals accountable and avenging the death of the leader Khamenei and other martyrs stands at the top of the people's demands. (Source: @yediotnews25/132083)

The IDF (Israel Defense Forces) and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, the military security chief of Hamas's Rafah Brigade, in an airstrike last week; al-Masri was responsible for obstructing IDF freedom of operation in Gaza and was involved in security and intelligence coordination. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

An IDF (Israel Defense Forces) Samsung XCover Pro 6 military cellphone was dropped near Tal al-Maghar hill, near the border village of Abidin in southern Syria, bearing stickers with a serial number identifying it as Israeli army property; the IDF stated the incident is known, under review, and being handled through relevant channels. (Source: @manniefabian/58712)

A massive Hamas tunnel system in the southern Gaza Strip, over 16 kilometers long, 25 meters deep, with approximately 80 separate rooms including command posts, was sealed by IDF (Israel Defense Forces) combat engineers using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete over the past three months. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)

At a Shas protest in Bnei Brak, Rabbi Yitzhak Yosef stated that yeshiva students are why Israel wins wars, and protestors directed harsh rhetoric against the IDF Chief of Staff; both Prime Minister Netanyahu and opposition chairman Benny Gantz condemned the statements. (Source: @N12chat/215267)

National Security Minister Smotrich announced that the Settlement Administration in the Ministry of Defense is prepared to establish three settlements in the northern Gaza Strip envelope immediately upon receiving political approval, stating that IDF (Israel Defense Forces) holds nearly 70% of the Gaza Strip. (Source: @almogboker78/17628)

A physical confrontation erupted in the Knesset plenum between coalition chairman Ofir Katz and MK Ayman Odeh over a Red Cross bill, requiring ushers to intervene to prevent the conflict from escalating to physical violence. (Source: @amitsegal/62654)

The IDF (Israel Defense Forces) and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, the military security chief of Hamas's Rafah Brigade, in an airstrike last week; he was a senior figure in Hamas's Rafah Division mechanisms and was responsible for advancing activities intended to harm IDF freedom of operation in the Gaza Strip. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

A massive Hamas tunnel system in the southern Gaza Strip where the group held the remains of Lt. Hadar Goldin for over a decade was recently sealed by IDF (Israel Defense Forces) combat engineers; the tunnel ran over 16 kilometers long, 25 meters deep, with approximately 80 rooms including command posts, and ran under civilian sites near the Strip's Egyptian border including a building belonging to UNRWA. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)

National Security Minister Smotrich announced the Settlement Administration is prepared to establish three settlements in the northern Gaza Strip envelope immediately upon receiving political approval, stating that IDF (Israel Defense Forces) holds nearly 70% of the Gaza Strip and that completing the conquest of remaining territory, defeating Hamas, and establishing a settlement security belt are priorities. (Source: @almogboker78/17628)

An Israeli Arabic-language IDF (Israel Defense Forces) spokesperson published a viral video titled 'On every card there is a senior Hamas name, but in the end the red stamp always arrives — eliminated. Hamas is on its way to disappearing.' (Source: @inon_yttach/9210)
According to reports, the United States is pressuring Israel to prevent the resumption of fighting in Gaza. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373643)
Six people were injured by gunfire in a clash in Wadi Jilo in southern Lebanon following a football match between Brazil and Japan. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93314)
Combat fighter jets were detected flying toward southern Lebanon with a warning for maximum caution. (Source: @redlinkleb/29131)
Two transport helicopters were monitored heading toward northern Palestine (southern Lebanon). (Source: @redlinkleb/29120)

According to a Wall Street Journal report, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio convinced Trump that Israel should remain in Lebanon and attack Iran, and Vice President JD Vance was forced to backtrack and announce support for Israel's agreement rather than that of the United States. (Source: @pkpoi/143041)
A poll found that a large majority of opinion holders support an agreement with Lebanon (46-19%), with the smallest level of support found among coalition voters. (Source: @amitsegal/62651)

An IDF (Israel Defense Forces) military cellphone belonging to a soldier was dropped near Tal al-Maghar hill, near the border village of Abidin in southern Syria, as published by the official SANA news agency and other media outlets. (Source: @manniefabian/58712)

According to reports, the Syrian Foreign Minister Asaad al-Shibani will make an official visit to Beirut this week, including a meeting with President Nabih Berri, carrying a Syrian message of reassurance confirming no intention to militarily intervene in Lebanese internal affairs. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373639)
Clashes erupted in Yaroumaja village in Kirkuk Governorate, northern Iraq, between an armed group and the Iraqi army. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80354)

Kurdish media reported the unification of Peshmerga forces in northern Iraq, with the former 70th and 80th Forces now designated as Region Command One and Region Command Two. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80363)

According to reports, the Israeli army broadcast scenes of dancing and dabke from the center of cities in Syria that the Syrian government claims are under its control, while simultaneously the Syrian government's forces pursue Shia communities in Homs, demolishing their homes and displacing them. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80366)

Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi stated that Iran and Oman reached a common understanding on the administration of the Strait of Hormuz, with Oman's Foreign Minister expressing support for Iran's plan to impose maritime service fees on vessels crossing the strait. (Source: @presstv/196196)
Press TV examined Iran's management of the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: @presstv/196212)
Asian stock markets and US futures traded higher following a new Dow Jones record, with most Asian markets trending upward following the halt of Middle East conflicts. (Source: @SharghDaily/168882)

key_developments: Two IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) members were killed under mysterious circumstances in western Iran overnight, with Tehran accusing the Israeli Mossad, marking a potential escalation in covert operations inside Iran. (Source: @pkpoi/143042)

An IDF (Israel Defense Forces) Samsung XCover Pro 6 military cellphone was dropped near Tal al-Maghar hill and the border village of Abidin in southern Syria, bearing Israeli army stickers and a serial number, with the IDF confirming the incident is under review. (Source: @manniefabian/58712)

The IDF (Israel Defense Forces) and Shin Bet eliminated Ismail al-Masri, the military security chief of Hamas's Rafah Brigade, in an airstrike last week; he was responsible for security and intelligence obstruction in the Rafah division. (Source: @pkpoi/143030)

A massive Hamas tunnel system in the southern Gaza Strip, over 16 kilometers long and 25 meters deep with approximately 80 rooms, was sealed by IDF (Israel Defense Forces) combat engineers using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)

At a Shas protest in Bnei Brak, harsh rhetoric was directed against the IDF (Israel Defense Forces) Chief of Staff, with protestors claiming yeshiva students are why Israel wins wars; both Netanyahu and Benny Gantz condemned the statements. (Source: @N12chat/215267)

National Security Minister Smotrich announced the Settlement Administration is prepared to establish three settlements in the northern Gaza Strip envelope immediately upon receiving political approval, stating IDF (Israel Defense Forces) holds nearly 70% of the Strip. (Source: @almogboker78/17628)

Clashes erupted in Yaroumaja village in Kirkuk Governorate, northern Iraq, between an armed group and the Iraqi army, while Kurdish media reported the unification of Peshmerga forces under Region Commands One and Two. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80354)
sections.threat_assessment: The killing of two IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) members in western Iran under mysterious circumstances represents a significant escalation in covert operations, with Tehran publicly accusing the Israeli Mossad. This, combined with the exposure of an IDF (Israel Defense Forces) military cellphone in southern Syria near the border village of Abidin, suggests heightened operational tempo across multiple fronts. The elimination of Hamas's Rafah Brigade military security chief Ismail al-Masri and the sealing of a 16-kilometer tunnel system indicate sustained Israeli counterterrorism operations in Gaza. Domestic Israeli tensions are rising, with inflammatory rhetoric against the military leadership at public demonstrations, potentially straining civil-military relations.
sections.regional_response: Iran signaled an uncompromising stance, with President Pezeshkian declaring that Iran enters dialogue from a position of strength, while an Iranian newspaper demanded revenge and accountability for the deaths of Khamenei and other martyrs. The United States is reportedly pressuring Israel to prevent the resumption of fighting in Gaza, while a Wall Street Journal report indicated Secretary of State Marco Rubio convinced Trump that Israel should remain in Lebanon and attack Iran. Syria's Foreign Minister Asaad al-Shibani planned a visit to Beirut with a message of reassurance confirming no intention to militarily intervene in Lebanese internal affairs. Iraq saw armed clashes in Kirkuk's Yaroumaja village and a structural unification of Peshmerga forces.
sections.intelligence_notes: The IRGC (Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps) has increased security visibility with multiple checkpoints and patrols spotted near Mehrabad Airport in western Tehran, potentially in response to the killing of two members in western Iran. The loss of an IDF (Israel Defense Forces) military cellphone in southern Syria is a potential intelligence compromise, with the device bearing identifying stickers and a serial number that could be exploited by adversary intelligence services. The US Vice President was reportedly forced to backtrack and announce support for Israel's agreement rather than that of the United States, suggesting internal disagreements within the American administration regarding Middle East policy. The ceasefire between Israel and Hamas that took effect in late 2025 enabled the recovery of Lt. Hadar Goldin's remains by Hamas members operating with the military's permission.
